🛡️ v1.0.0 "Aegis"

Privacy-First CAPTCHA Verification

Secure your website without compromising user privacy. Zero tracking, zero fingerprinting, zero cookies. Just pure cryptographic security.

Try Live Demo Learn More

Why Choose VaultGuard™?

Built from the ground up with privacy and security as core principles

Zero Tracking

We don't track, fingerprint, or profile users. No cookies, no analytics, no data collection. Your users' privacy is sacred.

Cryptographic Security

SHA-256 hashing with unique salts for every challenge. Time-limited tokens prevent replay attacks.

Time-Limited Challenges

Challenges automatically expire after configurable time periods. Default 5 minutes keeps your site secure.

GDPR Compliant

Zero data collection means simplified GDPR compliance. No consent banners needed for our CAPTCHA.

No Dependencies

Completely self-contained in a single file. No external libraries, no CDN requests, no bloat.

Easy Integration

Drop-in solution with beautiful UI. Works in any modern browser with a single script tag.

See It In Action

Try the VaultGuard™ CAPTCHA demo below. Solve the challenge to see how smooth and privacy-friendly verification can be.

  • No cookies set
  • No data collected
  • No external requests
  • 100% client-side

Simple Integration

Get started in seconds with just a few lines of code

index.html 
<!-- Include VaultGuard CAPTCHA -->
<script src="captcha.js"></script>

<div id="captcha-container"></div>

<script>
  // Initialize with quick setup
  VaultGuard.quickSetup('captcha-container', {
    callbacks: {
      onSuccess: (result, id) => {
        console.log('Verified!', result);
        // Proceed with form submission
      },
      onError: (result, id) => {
        console.log('Failed:', result.error);
      }
    }
  });
</script>

0

Cookies Used

0

External Requests

0

Data Collected

1

File to Include
